query:
SELECT cu.*, u.email, u.name, u.role as userRole, c.name as clientName 
FROM client_users cu
JOIN users u ON cu.userId = u.id
JOIN clients c ON cu.clientId = c.id
WHERE u.email = 'traceybechtol@gmail.com';
